sections.paragraph: ἐπουράνιος, ον [ἐπί, οὐρανός] heavenly, celestial J 3:12; 1 Cor 15:40, 48f; 2 Ti 4:18; Hb 3:1; 8:5. ἐν τ. ἐπουρανίοις in the heavenlies Eph 1:3 al. may refer to a transearthly realm where the drama of salvation is played out at a transcendent level and where Christ is triumphant over a variety of powers, thus ensuring victory for the believers; cp. Phil 2:10.
